// Sum: pseudo + TCP header + TCP data

div.p: sudo tcpdump -i tap0 -w capture.pcap Open in Wireshark, find problematic packet
Check each field matches our parser output Common issues: byte order (ntohs/ntohl)
Wireshark shows [correct] or [incorrect] If incorrect: check algorithm, pseudo-header
Match seq/ack numbers to connection state Verify flags match expected transitions
